report_name: Rituals Cosmetics Data Breach Exposes Personal Info of 'My Rituals' Members

identities.name: Rituals Cosmetics
identities.description: Amsterdam-based luxury cosmetics company that suffered a data breach affecting its 'My Rituals' loyalty program, resulting in the exposure of customer PII.

identities.name: 'My Rituals' members
identities.description: Members of the Rituals Cosmetics loyalty program whose personal information (full names, addresses, phone numbers, email addresses, dates of birth, and gender) was compromised in a data breach.

indicators.name: Potential Rituals Lookalike Domain DNS Query
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential Rituals Lookalike Domain DNS Query
id: 2b9a8c1d-f1e2-4b3c-8a7d-9e8f7a6b5c4d
status: experimental
description: Detects DNS queries to potential lookalike domains related to Rituals Cosmetics, which could be used for phishing campaigns post-breach.
references:
  - https://www.securityweek.com/luxury-cosmetics-giant-rituals-discloses-data-breach/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-23
tags:
  - attack.t1566.002
  - attack.initial_access
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate but rare domains.
level: medium
logsource:
  category: dns_query
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    QueryName|contains:
      - 'rituals-security.com'
      - 'my-rituals.net'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects DNS queries for potential lookalike domains of Rituals Cosmetics, which could be used in follow-up phishing campaigns targeting affected customers.
